title: Cerro Hueco Ecological Park
description: A forested hilltop offering hiking trails, scenic overlooks, and picnic areas. With its fresh air and panoramic views of Tierra Caliente, it’s a favorite spot for outdoor enthusiasts and families seeking nature and relaxation.

title: Las Joyas Waterfalls
description: Hidden among lush vegetation, these cascades — including Santa Rosa and El Capiri — offer cool waters, dramatic drops, and a peaceful atmosphere. Ideal for adventure seekers and photographers looking to capture Michoacán’s natural beauty.

title: Centro Ecoturístico Los Sauces
description: A rustic eco-park with cabins, hanging bridges, horseback riding, and zip lines. Surrounded by trees and streams, it’s a perfect place to disconnect and enjoy Tacámbaro’s wild side.
